title: Partner Scorecard
description: Structured scoring output used for partner tiering, risk review, explanation, and admin decisioning.

audience_access_score.description: 0-5 rating for direct access to relevant business owners or operators.

funding_relevance_score.description: 0-5 rating for how closely the audience maps to business funding or funding readiness needs.

existing_trust_score.description: 0-5 rating for how much trust the partner already has with their audience.

existing_deal_flow_score.description: 0-5 rating for current or likely recurring referral volume.

activation_speed_score.description: 0-5 rating for how quickly the partner can launch safely with existing assets.

compliance_risk_score.description: 0-5 risk rating. Higher number means higher compliance, brand, or operational risk.

strategic_leverage_score.description: 0-5 rating for ecosystem leverage, channel value, or strategic relationship value.

revenue_potential_score.description: 0-5 rating for likely commercial upside based on audience, trust, and flow. Not a guarantee.

technical_ability_score.description: 0-5 rating for ability to use links, forms, CRM workflows, content, tracking, or automation.

relationship_quality_score.description: 0-5 rating for professionalism, fit, clarity, and likelihood of a clean working relationship.

overall_score.description: Weighted overall score from 0-100. Must account for compliance risk as a negative factor.

tier_recommendation.description: Recommended partner tier based on score and risk.

manual_review_required.description: True when risk, missing information, strategic complexity, or claimed volume requires admin review.

reasoning_summary.description: Plain-English summary explaining the score, tier, and review logic.

risk_flags.description: Specific red flags or risk notes.

missing_info.description: Missing fields or unanswered questions needed for confident classification.

examples.reasoning_summary: Strong referral partner fit due to existing client trust and relevant SMB audience. Keep activation referral-only until referral process and safe language are confirmed.
